display.purpose: Restaurant names at hero scale, primary page titles. Playfair Display only at this role.

headline.purpose: Section titles on restaurant pages, menu category headers.

title.purpose: Card headings, order summaries, sidebar section titles. Manrope at this scale.

body.purpose: Menu item descriptions, order history, all paragraph content. 65ch max line length.

label.purpose: Navigation links, form labels, status badges, tag pills. Uppercase, tracked.

shadows.name: ambient
shadows.purpose: Barely-there lift on small interactive tokens (chips, qty buttons).

shadows.name: structural
shadows.purpose: Card hover states, selected states, elevated containers.

shadows.name: fire-glow
shadows.purpose: Primary button hover, add-to-cart button, FAB. The only colored shadow.

motion.name: ease-in-out
motion.purpose: Continuous or reversible transitions (theme toggle, drawer).

breakpoints.name: mobile-only
breakpoints.purpose: Reduced gutter (14px), bottom tab bar visible, mobile nav height 58px.

breakpoints.name: tablet
breakpoints.purpose: Desktop nav visible, bottom tab bar hidden.

breakpoints.name: auth-split
breakpoints.purpose: Auth page shows visual split panel.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action button. Fire background, used for one primary action per screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #ff6b35; color: #ffffff; padding: 12px 20px; min-height: 44px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 10px 26px rgba(255,107,53,0.22); transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), box-shadow 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #e85a28; box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(255,107,53,0.32); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); box-shadow: 0 6px 16px rgba(255,107,53,0.20); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(255,107,53,0.28); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Supporting action. Card background with mid border.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #fafaf7; color: #1f2328; padding: 12px 20px; min-height: 44px; border: 1px solid rgba(31,35,40,0.14); border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #f4f4f0; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(31,35,40,0.12); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: transparent; color: #1f2328; padding: 12px 20px; min-height: 44px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(31,35,40,0.05); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(31,35,40,0.12); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form field. Fire focus ring.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-label { font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-size: 0.64rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #4b535c; } .ds-input { padding: 14px 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(31,35,40,0.14); border-radius: 8px; background: #fafaf7; color: #1f2328; font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; transition: border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), box-shadow 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #9ca3af; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #ff6b35; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(255,107,53,0.10); }

components.name: Tag Pill
components.description: Cuisine type or category label. Uppercase label scale.
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 100px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.45); color: #ffffff; font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-size: 0.64rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; backdrop-filter: blur(8px); } .ds-tag--active { background: rgba(255,107,53,0.10); color: #ff6b35; backdrop-filter: none; }

components.name: Order Status Badge
components.description: Status indicator on order cards. Color by state, always with text.
components.css: .ds-status { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-size: 0.64rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-status--pending { background: rgba(245,158,11,0.10); color: #d97706; border: 1px solid rgba(245,158,11,0.25); } .ds-status--preparing { background: rgba(255,107,53,0.10); color: #e85a28; border: 1px solid rgba(255,107,53,0.25); } .ds-status--ready { background: oklch(62% 0.19 145 / 0.08); color: oklch(50% 0.15 145); border: 1px solid oklch(62% 0.19 145 / 0.25); } .ds-status--cancelled { background: oklch(59% 0.22 27 / 0.08); color: oklch(46% 0.18 27); border: 1px solid oklch(59% 0.22 27 / 0.20); }

components.name: Restaurant Card
components.description: Primary discovery unit. Photo-forward with dark scrim, metadata overlay.
components.html:
Italian
Bello Posto20 min · from 250₽
components.css: .ds-restaurant-card { position: relative; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(31,35,40,0.08); overflow: hidden; aspect-ratio: 3/2; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(31,35,40,0.06); transition: box-shadow 300ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), transform 300ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-restaurant-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(31,35,40,0.08); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-restaurant-card__photo { position: absolute; inset: 0; background-size: cover; background-position: center; filter: saturate(1.02) contrast(1.02); } .ds-restaurant-card__scrim { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.74) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.32) 45%, rgba(0,0,0,0.05) 100%); display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-between; padding: 10px 12px; } .ds-restaurant-card__meta { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; } .ds-restaurant-card__title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 800; color: #ffffff; line-height: 1.2; } .ds-restaurant-card__sub { font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 400; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75); }

components.name: Menu Item Row
components.description: Horizontal food item with photo, description, price and add button.
components.html:
MargheritaClassic tomato, mozzarella, fresh basil
350₽
components.css: .ds-menu-item { display: flex; border: 1px solid rgba(31,35,40,0.08); border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; background: #ffffff; transition: border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-menu-item:hover { border-color: rgba(31,35,40,0.14); } .ds-menu-item__img { width: 100px; min-height: 90px; flex-shrink: 0; background-size: cover; background-position: center; } .ds-menu-item__body { flex: 1; padding: 14px 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-menu-item__name { font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 800; color: #1f2328; line-height: 1.35; } .ds-menu-item__desc { font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 400; color: #6b7280; line-height: 1.55; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden; } .ds-menu-item__footer { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-top: auto; padding-top: 8px; } .ds-menu-item__price { font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 800; color: #1f2328; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-add-btn { width: 38px; height: 38px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #ff6b35; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(255,107,53,0.22); transition: background 180ms, box-shadow 180ms, transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-add-btn:hover { background: #e85a28; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(255,107,53,0.32); transform: scale(1.05); } .ds-add-btn:active { transform: scale(0.96); }

components.name: Desktop Header
components.description: Fixed top navigation with frosted glass background. Active state in fire.
components.html:
Foodize
MenuOrdersProfile
components.css: .ds-header { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 64px; background: rgba(250,250,247,0.88); backdrop-filter: blur(18px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(31,35,40,0.08); z-index: 100; } .ds-header__inner { max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 20px; height: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .ds-header__brand { font-family: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; color: #1f2328; } .ds-header__nav { display: flex; gap: 4px; } .ds-nav-link { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 100px; font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-size: 0.64rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; color: #6b7280; transition: color 180ms, background 180ms; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #1f2328; background: rgba(31,35,40,0.05); } .ds-nav-link--active { color: #ff6b35; background: rgba(255,107,53,0.10); }

components.name: Cart FAB
components.description: Floating action button for cart. Fire background, pill shape, Fire Glow shadow.
components.css: .ds-cart-fab { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 56px; height: 56px; background: #ff6b35; border: none; border-radius: 100px; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 10px 28px rgba(255,107,53,0.32); transition: background 180ms, box-shadow 180ms, transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-cart-fab:hover { background: #e85a28; box-shadow: 0 14px 36px rgba(255,107,53,0.40); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-cart-fab:active { transform: translateY(0) scale(0.96); } .ds-cart-fab__badge { position: absolute; top: -4px; right: -4px; width: 20px; height: 20px; background: #ffffff; color: #e85a28; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-size: 0.64rem; font-weight: 800; }

narrative.overview:
Foodize is a warm, deliberate product. Not the urgency of a delivery app with discount banners and countdown timers, but the quiet confidence of a well-edited restaurant guide: every screen makes food look desirable before it handles logistics. The system earns its personality through restraint. The fire-and-amber palette is present only where it earns its place. Serif type appears as a mark of quality, not decoration. The overall feeling is that of a carefully produced object, not a generated storefront.

This system rejects the first-reflex responses for food apps: Яндекс Еда's aggressive red and discount-first hierarchy, Wolt's cold Scandinavian minimalism, Uber Eats' neon-on-dark brutalism. It also rejects the generic SaaS answer: Tailwind clones with Inter on white, card grids without personality, no editorial voice.
keyCharacteristics: Fire-amber accent used sparingly; its rarity makes it mean something
Playfair Display appears only at display and headline scale; body work is Manrope's territory
Tonal layer system (bg, bg-card, bg-surface, bg-raised) structures depth without shadows at rest
Shadows reserved for floating elements: modals, drawers, FABs, cart overlays
Motion is responsive, not choreographed: state feedback, not performance

rules.name: The One Flame Rule
rules.body: Fire and its states are used on at most one primary action per screen. When fire appears, it is the only saturated color visible at that moment.

rules.name: The No-White Background Rule
rules.body: Page backgrounds are never pure #ffffff. Paper (#fafaf7) is the floor in light mode. All surfaces stack upward via the tonal layer system.

rules.name: The Serif Scarcity Rule
rules.body: Playfair Display is used for Display and Headline roles only. It never appears in body text, labels, buttons, or navigation.

rules.name: The Scale Contract
rules.body: Font sizes follow a 1.25x ratio. No intermediate values. No font-size: 15px.

rules.name: The Float Rule
rules.body: Shadows are a property of motion and state, not of visual hierarchy at rest. If an element is not floating, dragging, or being interacted with, it has no shadow.

rules.name: The Fire Glow Exception
rules.body: The Fire Glow shadow appears only on fire-colored interactive elements. It does not appear on any other color.

dos: Do use tonal background layers (bg → bg-card → bg-surface → bg-raised) to communicate depth at rest before reaching for shadows.
Do reserve Playfair Display for Display and Headline typographic roles only.
Do use fire as a single concentrated signal per screen.
Do pair every status color signal with a text or icon label.
Do treat food photography as the primary visual asset.
Do keep body text to 65ch maximum line length.
Do use prefers-reduced-motion to disable all keyframe animations.
donts: Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards, list items, or alerts.
Don't use background-clip: text with a gradient.
Don't use glassmorphism on static cards or information panels.
Don't make the design look like Яндекс Еда: no aggressive red, no discount banner hierarchy.
Don't make the design look like Wolt: no cold blue palette, no clinical minimalism.
Don't make the design look like Uber Eats: no dark-on-neon color schemes.
Don't produce generic SaaS output: no Tailwind-default card grids, no Inter on white.
Don't use shadows on static, at-rest cards.
Don't reuse fire for decorative fills or background tinting.
